code: import React from'react';import{jsxs as _jsxs,jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";function QuestCard(_ref){let quest=_ref.quest,onStartTimer=_ref.onStartTimer;const getCategoryEmoji=category=>{const emojis={mindfulness:'🧘',sketching:'🎨',study:'📚',sports:'⚽',music:'🎹',morning:'🌅',wind_down:'🌙'};return emojis[category]||'📋';};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"quest-card",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"quest-header",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"quest-name",children:[getCategoryEmoji(quest.category)," ",quest.name]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"quest-desc",children:quest.desc}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("span",{className:"quest-time",children:["\u23F0 ",quest.time]})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"quest-points",children:[quest.points," pts"]})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"quest-actions",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("button",{className:"start-timer-btn",onClick:onStartTimer,children:["\u23F1\uFE0F Start (",quest.duration,"m)"]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"complete-btn",children:"\u2713 Mark Done"})]})]});}export default QuestCard;
